description: You are the Customer Support Operations Manager at a SaaS company. Your company has just signed enterprise contracts and needs a dedicated support channel. In FreeScout (http://localhost:8080, admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!), set up a new mailbox named 'Enterprise Support' (enterprise@helpdesk.local). Create two support agents: James Kowalski (james.kowalski@helpdesk.local, User) and Priya Sharma (priya.sharma@helpdesk.local, User). Grant James access to both 'Technical Support' and 'Enterprise Support' mailboxes, and grant Priya access to 'Enterprise Support' only. Create a saved reply named 'Enterprise Acknowledgment' with the body: 'Thank you for contacting our Enterprise Support team. A dedicated support agent will be assigned to your case within 2 business hours.' Tag all conversations in the Technical Support mailbox as 'technical' and assign all conversations in the Billing Support mailbox to Sarah Mitchell.
